content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach trips multiple major AoA anti-patterns. Turn 2 issues a verdict ('No, you're not being selfish') — engaging the question on its terms and skipping to the spiritual/generous reframe ('so we can show up better for the people we love'), tripping spiritual-narcissism. Turn 4 is textbook fixing-people ('Have you thought about...', 'You should also make sure to think about your partner's needs') and also jumps to partner-empathy before the client's want is even touched (dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger). Turn 6 stacks more advice ('You should have an honest conversation', 'Use I-feel statements', 'Have you tried journaling') — fixing-people and wonder-as-strategy. Turn 8 fights the guilt/inner-critic by reframing it away ('Guilt is just an emotion — it doesn't have to control you', 'instead of feeling guilty, what if...') — dont-fight-the-voice plus evangelizing ('abundance mindset'). Turn 10 pushes transformation and seeks validation ('Does that resonate?') — loving-to-transform and vulnerability-as-control adjacent. At no point does the coach locate the want underneath or let it be felt.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Issues verdict on the selfish question and jumps to generous reframe — spiritual-narcissism, engages question on its terms."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Advice-giving ('Have you thought about...', 'You should...') and pushes partner-empathy — fixing-people, dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Stacked prescriptive advice (I-feel statements, journaling) — fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Reframes guilt away rather than including it; deploys 'abundance mindset' jargon — dont-fight-the-voice, evangelizing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Pushes the action ('I really encourage you to go') and asks 'Does that resonate?' — loving-to-transform, fixing-people."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Multiple clear trips: spiritual-narcissism, dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger, fixing-people, dont-fight-the-voice, loving-to-transform, mild evangelizing."
}
